Got a Touch of Genius?

Join us in our mission to bring the power of touch to the digital world.

View Current Openings
We love the way great ideas feel in your hands.

We’re a team of smart, passionate people inspired by the desire to make technology more personal, powerful, and vivid. Companies all over the world are discovering that touch can be a powerful differentiator in phones, wearables, and even cars, enabling richer user experiences and more intuitive interfaces. Immersion’s haptic technology is found in billions of devices today. And we’ve only just begun to tap into the possibilities.

25+
Years of Innovation
3
Billion Devices & Count
1
Amazing Mission
	
We’re on a mission to transform the digital world.

We’re visionaries, doers, and thinkers. At Immersion, we know what’s possible when technology comes to life and digital experiences become more human. We’re driven to help our customers harness the transformational power of touch to innovate new experiences and business models. We embrace challenges, take risks, and collaborate every step of the way.

We’re Immersion, and we’re always looking for great people and ideas.

Smile. You’re at Immersion.

Innovation should be fun. At Immersion, you’ll enjoy the energy and excitement of a startup environment with perks like biweekly fresh fruit, stocked break rooms, yoga classes, an onsite gym, ping pong tables, and more.* Plus, all the benefits
